search_document:
User Request: Order summary dashboard.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Top Customers by Revenue
Type: table
Description: Highest spending customers aggregated by total order value
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue from all orders
Title: Orders by Status
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of orders by status (e.g., shipped, pending)
Title: Average Order Value
Type: kpi
Description: Average value of orders placed
Title: Orders by Region
Type: chart
Description: Total orders aggregated by region

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Customers by Revenue
sql_queries.description: Highest spending customers aggregated by total order value
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.CompanyName ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" od

sql_queries.title: Orders by Status
sql_queries.description: Distribution of orders by status (e.g., shipped, pending)
sql_queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN ShippedDate IS NOT NULL THEN 'Shipped' ELSE 'Pending' END AS OrderStatus, COUNT(*) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY OrderStatus

sql_queries.title: Average Order Value
sql_queries.sql: SELECT AVG(OrderValue) AS AverageOrderValue FROM (SELECT o.OrderID, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS OrderValue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.OrderID)

sql_queries.title: Orders by Region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.Region, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders o JOIN Employees e ON o.EmployeeID = e.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.Region
